title: Review grouped action-bar work as an independent change
goal: Recover and review the grouped action-bar intent changes independently from node mutation PR #1440, publish them only through a separate branch and diff, and avoid mixing unrelated UI refactoring into the node integrity review.

acceptance.assertion: The action-bar implementation and test commits are recovered from preserved Git objects without reintroducing them into PR #1440.
Any publication uses a separate current-main branch, focused tests and its own exact downloadable diff.
acceptance.verifier: separate PR or explicit rejection decision

acceptance.assertion: GitHub is checked immediately before publication so no concurrent action-bar PR is duplicated.
